data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: All data transmitted between users and the site is encrypted.
data.technical_spec: Uses modern TLS protocols with strong ciphers.

data.title: Web Application Firewall
data.description: Filters out malicious traffic and protects against common web exploits.
data.technical_spec: Integrated on the edge with providers like Cloudflare.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Ongoing vulnerability assessments and patch management.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates automated scanning tools and manual penetration testing.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Users have the option for an additional layer of login security.
data.technical_spec: Supports OTP and device-based authentication systems.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Prevents and mitigates distributed denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Uses scalable traffic filtering solutions at the network edge.
